shutdownPeriods.comments: Over the month of January the facility had 3 of the 7 units down for extended periods due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime associated with those units in January equated to 1,536 hours

Over the month of March the facility had 1 of the 7 units down for an extended period due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime for that unit in March equated to 313.50 hours
Over the month of April the facility had 2 of the 7 units down for extended periods due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime in April equated to 529 hours
Over the month of July the facility had 2 of the 7 units down for extended periods due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime in July equated to 620 hours
Over the month of August the facility had 1 of the 7 units down for an extended period due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime in August equated to 362 hours

Over the month of September the facility had 3 of the 7 units down for extended periods due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime for these units in September equated to 1,139 hours

Over the month of October the facility had 1 of the 7 units down for an extended period due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime associated with this unit in October equated to 261 hours

Over the month of November the facility had 1 of the 7 units down for an extended period due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime associated with that unit in November equated to 270 hours

Over the month of December the facility had 1 of the 7 units down for an extended period due to either planned or unplanned downtime.  Cumulative hours for total downtime in December for this unit equated to 226 hours

comments.comment:
The strict performance criteria associated with some of our grades resulted in an increased amount of off-specification product being unsuitable for on-site recycling and thus was sent to landfill.

Increased production levels resulted in an increased amount of anthracene contaminated oil filters being disposed.

The strict performance criteria associated with some of our grades resulted in an increased amount of off-specification product being unsuitable for on-site recycling and thus was sent to landfill.

Increased production levels resulted in an increased amount of benzo(b)fluoranthene contaminated oil filters being disposed.

The strict performance criteria associated with some of our grades resulted in an increased amount of off-specification product being unsuitable for on-site recycling and thus being sent to landfill.

Increased production levels resulted in an increased amount of benzo(k)fluoranthene contaminated oil filters being disposed.

The strict performance criteria associated with some of our grades resulted in an increased amount of off-specification product being unsuitable for on-site recycling and thus was sent to landfill.

Increased production levels resulted in an increased amount of chrysene contaminated oil filters being disposed.

The strict performance criteria associated with some of our grades resulted in an increased amount of off-specification product being unsuitable for on-site recycling and thus was sent to landfill.

Increased production levels resulted in an increased amount of benzo(a)pyrene contaminated oil filters being disposed.

The strict performance criteria associated with some of our grades resulted in an increased amount of off-specification product being unsuitable for on-site recycling and thus was sent to landfill.

Increased production levels resulted in an increased amount of benzo(a)anthracene contaminated oil filters being disposed.

In 2022, due to the strict performance criteria associated with our product, some non-standard inventory was unable to be recycled resulting in an increased amount of off-specification product being sent to landfill.  In addition, oil contaminated filters were disposed of at landfill.
The strict performance requirements associated with the different grades of our product resulted in an increased amount of off-specification product being sent to landfill.
